headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热搜
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片仅2部。《痴迷》《鬼上车》等剧集热搜领先，多部大片即将上映。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, only 2 this week. Dramas like 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Car' lead trending, with major films upcoming.
